goal_results.evidence: Patch adds "AMD64": "x64" to arch dict (line 139) and elif system == "Windows": system_suffix = f"windows-{arch}" branch (lines 151-152). Tests T1=1, T2=1, T3=1 confirm behavioral correctness: get_llvm_package_info returns URL containing 'windows' and 'x64' for Windows/AMD64.

download_and_extract_archive(url, extract_path) defined at build_helpers.py:193. Handles .zip via BytesIO+zipfile (line 195-198) and tar via tarfile stream extract (lines 199-205). Positioned before callers _get_thirdparty_package_cmake_vars and download_and_copy. Tests T4=1 (exists), T5=1 (zip extraction), T6=1 (tar extraction), T16=1 (ordering) all pass.

Patch replaces 11 lines of inline tar/zip extraction in _get_thirdparty_package_cmake_vars with single call: download_and_extract_archive(package.url, package_root_dir). Test T7=1 confirms AST call presence.

Patch adds "AMD64": "x86_64" to arch dict, "Windows": "windows" to supported dict, url.replace(".tar.xz", ".zip") for Windows, and replaces inline tar extraction with download_and_extract_archive(url, tmp_path). Tests T11=1 (calls helper), T15=1 (Windows string in function), T17=1 (AMD64 dict key) all pass.

No changes to download_and_copy_dependencies in agent.patch. Verified workspace build_helpers.py:317 — function has no early return for Windows. The commit 2 (aa3175f252) changes were not implemented.

judge_notes: Agent implemented all commit 1 (4535fc2bdf) changes perfectly: Windows/AMD64 support in get_llvm_package_info, download_and_extract_archive helper, refactored callers. All 11 test checks pass (T1-T17, reward=1.0). However, commit 2 (aa3175f252) — adding early return in download_and_copy_dependencies for Windows — was not implemented (goal_5). Score = 0.36+0.36+0.09+0.10+0 = 0.91 → 'equivalent'.
